import gymnasium as gym
import numpy as np
from gymnasium import spaces

TASKS = [
    "h1hand-walk-v0",
    "h1hand-stand-v0",
    "h1hand-run-v0",
    "h1hand-sit_simple-v0",
    "h1hand-balance_simple-v0",
    "h1hand-reach-v0",
    "h1hand-push-v0",
    "h1hand-pole-v0",
    "h1hand-door-v0",
    "h1hand-package-v0",
]
TASK_TO_IDX = {t: i for i, t in enumerate(TASKS)}
MAX_OBS_DIM = 173
PADDED_DIM = MAX_OBS_DIM + len(TASKS)

class PadTaskObsWrapper(gym.ObservationWrapper):
    def __init__(self, env, task_id: str):
        super().__init__(env)
        self.task_id = task_id
        self.task_idx = TASK_TO_IDX[task_id]
        self.orig_dim = int(np.prod(env.observation_space.shape))
        low = np.full((PADDED_DIM,), -np.inf, dtype=np.float32)
        high = np.full((PADDED_DIM,), np.inf, dtype=np.float32)
        low[MAX_OBS_DIM:] = 0.0
        high[MAX_OBS_DIM:] = 1.0
        self.observation_space = spaces.Box(low=low, high=high, dtype=np.float32)

    def observation(self, obs):
        obs = np.asarray(obs, dtype=np.float32).reshape(-1)
        out = np.zeros((PADDED_DIM,), dtype=np.float32)
        n = min(len(obs), MAX_OBS_DIM)
        out[:n] = obs[:n]
        out[MAX_OBS_DIM + self.task_idx] = 1.0
        return out

def make_task_env(task_id: str, seed: int | None = None, monitor: bool = True):
    import humanoid_bench  # noqa: F401
    from stable_baselines3.common.monitor import Monitor
    env = gym.make(task_id)
    env = PadTaskObsWrapper(env, task_id)
    if seed is not None:
        env.reset(seed=int(seed))
    if monitor:
        env = Monitor(env)
    return env
